Artifact Stat

StatFlat shield
Value range21,000 shield to 31,500 shield

Drop weight1
Eligible levels50-80
Approx. type odds0.06%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Flat shield is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Hydrogen Spill90-120
Toxic Waste90-120

Related Artifact Variants

  • Shield Generator
  • Superior Shield Generator
